meta.title: MP3 Cover & ID3 Tag Editor
meta.description: Upload MP3 files, edit ID3 tags, change the download filename, and save an updated file with new cover art.

hero.title: Upload MP3 files, edit ID3 tags, and add a new cover image.
hero.description: The interface is focused on one task: open an MP3, update its metadata, and download the refreshed file under a new name.
hero.dropzoneDescription: Or click this area to choose a file from your computer. After upload, all editing fields will appear below.
steps: Wait until the current tags are loaded.
Update the filename, metadata, and cover.

items.title: Fast processing
items.description: Read tags, update artwork, and export in one clean flow.

items.title: Metadata editor
items.description: Change filename, title, artist, album, genre, year, track, and comment.

items.title: Cover workflow
items.description: Preview the current artwork, replace it, and keep player-friendly export settings.

file.readyDescription: Metadata is loaded. You can keep editing tags and cover art.
file.name: File

status.idle: Drop an MP3 into the area below or choose a file from your computer.
status.loaded: File loaded. You can now edit tags and cover art.
status.saved: Done. Your updated MP3 is downloading.
status.saveFailed: Could not save the updated file.

errors.readFailed: Could not read the MP3 file.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save the updated MP3.

cover.empty: This file does not have embedded cover art yet.

footer.text: MP3 Tag Editor keeps the production flow simple: upload, edit, and download.
